name: scholarly-research-book
description: Agent Skills plugin for rigorous research nonfiction and research book writing: research intent routing, research agenda, source discovery, literature review, argument architecture, chapters, prose, citations, and manuscript continuity.

interface.shortDescription: Research intent routing plus argument, citation, and manuscript workflows for scholarly nonfiction.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin bundling focused Agent Skills for planning, researching, drafting, auditing, and revising a serious research nonfiction or research book. Includes lightweight research-intent routing, staged architecture docs, a mode registry, book artifact contracts, source discovery, literature review mapping, claim-evidence ledgers, counterargument review, citation integrity checks, and book proposal support.
defaultPrompt: Use research-intent-router to classify this research request, choose the smallest useful skill route, and decide whether deep source lookup is needed.
Use research-intent-router in deep mode to route this research request and attempt source lookup with verification limits.
Use Research Book Skills to turn my book idea into a staged research and writing plan.
Audit this chapter with the claim-evidence ledger and citation-integrity auditor.
Map this literature into schools of thought, debates, gaps, and a chapter strategy.
Create JSON book artifacts that follow the book artifact contract.
